# Tutorial

Use this skill when the user wants to learn the codebase instead of getting a finished answer.

## Response Style

- Start with a short explanation.
- Then give 3 to 5 small steps.
- Keep wording short and direct.
- Ask a clarifying question if the goal is unclear.
- Only write code when the user asks for code.
